research.product: Okta Workforce Identity Cloud — Users API
research.interface: Okta Core management REST API /api/v1 (official OpenAPI spec 2026.07.1)

official_sources.title: okta/okta-management-openapi-spec — Okta Admin Management API (version 2026.07.1)
official_sources.used_for: createUser (POST /api/v1/users, activate query param default true, CreateUserRequest with profile/credentials, 200 returns User); activateUser (POST /api/v1/users/{id}/lifecycle/activate, sendEmail default true, 200 UserActivationToken with activationToken/activationUrl, STAGED/DEPROVISIONED precondition, async transitioningToStatus=ACTIVE); getUser; UserStatus enum; User._links HAL semantics; Error schema and canned examples (E0000001 ApiValidationFailed with errorCauses, E0000006 AccessDenied, E0000007 ResourceNotFound)

official_sources.title: Okta API Error Codes | Okta Developer
official_sources.used_for: exact HTTP status and errorSummary per code: E0000001=400 validation, E0000006=403 permission, E0000016=403 'Activation failed because the user is already active' (transition), E0000007=404 not found; confirms both 403 codes must be told apart by errorCode

official_sources.title: Core Okta API | Okta Developer
official_sources.used_for: org base URL pattern https://{yourOktaDomain}/api/v1/..., SSWS Authorization scheme, application/json media types, error envelope fields errorCode/errorSummary/errorLink/errorId/errorCauses, X-Okta-Request-Id

official_sources.title: Users | Okta Developer (management API reference)
official_sources.used_for: canonical current reference location for the Users API operations; confirms activate/provider/nextLogin query params and the User response shape rendered from the same OpenAPI contract

research.language_rationale: User provisioning glue at this shop runs on the JVM alongside the HR importers; the Users API is documented as plain versioned REST (/api/v1) with JSON bodies and SSWS header auth, so java.net.http.HttpClient against the documented wire contract is a credible, dependency-free integration surface (Okta's Java management SDK is a wrapper generated from this same OpenAPI spec).

verified_facts: POST /api/v1/users defaults to activate=true; a staged-only create must pass activate=false explicitly and returns 200 with status STAGED
Create-user request nests attributes under profile (firstName, lastName, email, login required by the default schema); extra Universal Directory attributes ride in the same object
POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/lifecycle/activate is only valid from STAGED or DEPROVISIONED; sendEmail defaults to true; with sendEmail=false the 200 body carries activationToken and activationUrl
Activation is asynchronous: the user document exposes transitioningToStatus=ACTIVE while in flight, and status flips to ACTIVE (with an activated timestamp) when complete
UserStatus enum: ACTIVE, DEPROVISIONED, LOCKED_OUT, PASSWORD_EXPIRED, PROVISIONED, RECOVERY, STAGED, SUSPENDED
_links is HAL (RFC 8288 relations): the available relations depend on the user's current status and hrefs are absolute; clients must not rebuild them
Error envelope: errorCode, errorSummary, errorLink, errorId, errorCauses[].errorSummary
E0000001 -> 400 validation (errorCauses list the field problems); E0000006 -> 403 permission; E0000016 -> 403 activation-failed-already-active; E0000007 -> 404; the two 403s differ only by errorCode
Auth: Authorization: SSWS {token} (or OAuth Bearer with okta.users.manage); Accept and Content-Type are application/json
